prompt: Create a full-body anime idol character design on a clean white background, centered and slightly floating, with a polished Japanese mobile-game illustration style. The character is a young woman with vivid cherry-pink long hair tied into a high side ponytail that streams leftward, with braided bangs, glossy highlights, loose face-framing strands, and ornate sakura hair ornaments with tassels and ribbons. Her face should be intentionally obscured by a soft square blur, while the rest of the illustration remains crisp and highly detailed. Dress her in a glamorous wa-modern floral idol outfit combining kimono sleeves, a corset bodice, and layered skirt: a white high-neck frilled blouse with lace ruffles; a black fitted corset with gold trim, pink crisscross lacing, small gold chains, and a large central sakura bow; deep magenta detached kimono sleeves with black-and-gold borders, wide flared cuffs, ribbon ties, tassels, and pink cherry blossom embroidery; a short white underskirt with lace hem; a black asymmetrical overskirt with gold edging and sakura patterns; and a transparent layered organza train in smoky pink and lavender, cascading down both sides with ruffled hems, gold lines, and scattered blossom prints. Use exactly 6 main outfit components: blouse, corset, detached kimono sleeves, underskirt, black overskirt, translucent organza train. Add exactly 5 prominent accessory groups: sakura hair ornament, dangling tassel earrings, oversized waist bow with flower center, wrist ribbon details, and ankle flower tassels. Include white tabi-style platform boots with black straps, magenta panels, gold trim, thick dark soles, and tiny floral accents. Pose her with one hand on her hip and the other raised near the shoulder in a lively idol gesture, legs close together and toes pointed inward. Color palette: deep magenta and black with pale pink, white lace, gold trim, and cherry-blossom motifs. Surround her with a few small drifting sakura petals, but keep the background empty and bright. Render with clean line art, delicate shading, intricate fabric textures, translucent layers, glossy hair, high-detail embroidery, elegant fantasy fashion design, no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
